zh.lifeSummary: 當Teresa Bermudes de Trava於1137年出生時，她的父親Bermudo Pérez de Trava y Urgel50歲，母親Infanta Urraca Henriques40歲。她和Fernán Arias de Saavedra Señor de Saavedra, de Lima y Batissela至少有9個兒子和3個女兒。她於1145年在西班牙加利西亞A 可盧納貝坦左斯被列為abadesa del monasterio de as cascas (betanzos, galicia, españa)。她去世於大約1219年在西班牙加利西亞享年83歲，埋葬在西班牙加利西亞A 可盧納索布拉多桑塔 瑪麗亞。

nameMeanings.name: Bermudes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Carlos, Jesus, Miguel, Pedro, Alfredo, Angel, Armando, Cesar, Eduardo, Elivia, Emigdio.
Portuguese and Spanish: variant of   Bermudez  .

variants.name: Bermudez
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Luis, Carlos, Manuel, Jesus, Francisco, Pedro, Eduardo, Jorge, Raul, Miguel.
Spanish (Bermúdez): patronymic from the Visigothic personal name Bermudo, itself from ancient Germanic ber- ‘bear’ + mōd- ‘courage’.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Trava
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Norwegian: habitational name from a farm name in Trøndelag, derived from trane ‘crane’. — Note: The population figure published by the US Census Bureau for this surname in the year 2000 is as high as 423, while the figure for 2010 is supposedly lower than 100.

nameMeanings.name: Teresa
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Theresa .  In the English-speaking world the name is often chosen in this spelling by Roman Catholics, with particular reference to the Spanish saint, Teresa of Ávila (  Teresa Cepeda de Ahumada ,  1515–82 ).

variants.name: Theresa
meanings: Of problematic origin. The name seems to have been first used in Spain and Portugal, and, according to tradition, was the name of the wife of St Paulinus of Nola, who spent most of his life in Spain; she was said to have originated (and to have derived her name) from the Greek island of Thēra. However, this story is neither factually nor etymologically confirmed.

variants.name: Teresia
meanings: form of   Theresa .  In the English-speaking world the name is often chosen in this spelling by Roman Catholics, with particular reference to the Spanish saint, Teresa of Ávila (  Teresa Cepeda de Ahumada ,  1515–82 ).

historicEvents.description: The Christian territory controlled the Kingdoms of Aragon, Navarre, and Castile.

en.lifeSummary: When Teresa Bermudes de Trava was born in 1137, her father, Bermudo Pérez de Trava y Urgel, was 50 and her mother, Infanta Urraca Henriques, was 40. She had at least 9 sons and 3 daughters with Fernán Arias de Saavedra Señor de Saavedra, de Lima y Batissela. In 1145, at the age of 8, her occupation is listed as abadesa del monasterio de as cascas (betanzos, galicia, españa) in Betanzos, A Coruña, Galicia, Spain. She died about 1219, in Galicia, Spain, at the age of 83, and was buried in Santa Maria, Sobrado, A Coruña, Galicia, Spain.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Teresa Bermudes de Trava est née en 1137, son père, Bermudo Pérez de Trava y Urgel, avait 50 ans et sa mère, Infanta Urraca Henriques, avait 40 ans. Elle a eu au moins 9 fils et 3 filles avec Fernán Arias de Saavedra Señor de Saavedra, de Lima y Batissela. En 1145, à l’âge de 8 ans, la profession de sa indiquée est abadesa del monasterio de as cascas (betanzos, galicia, españa) à Betanzos, A Coruña, Galicia, Espagne. Elle est décédée environ 1219, à Galicia, Espagne, à l’âge de 83 ans, et a été enterrée à Santa Maria, Sobrado, A Coruña, Galicia, Espagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Teresa Bermudes de Trava 1137 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Bermudo Pérez de Trava y Urgel 50 und ihre Mutter Infanta Urraca Henriques 40. Sie hatte mit Fernán Arias de Saavedra Señor de Saavedra, de Lima y Batissela mindestens 9 Söhne und 3 Töchter. 1145, als sie 8 Jahre alt war, war ihr Beruf als abadesa del monasterio de as cascas (betanzos, galicia, españa) in Betanzos, A Coruña, Galicia, Spanien aufgeführt. Sie starb um 1219 im Alter von 83 Jahren in Galicia, Spanien und wurde in Santa Maria, Sobrado, A Coruña, Galicia, Spanien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Teresa Bermudes de Trava è nata il nel 1137, sua padre, Bermudo Pérez de Trava y Urgel, aveva 50 anni e sua madre, Infanta Urraca Henriques, aveva 40 anni. Lei avuto almeno 9 figli e 3 figlie con Fernán Arias de Saavedra Señor de Saavedra, de Lima y Batissela. Nel 1145, all'età di 8 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come abadesa del monasterio de as cascas (betanzos, galicia, españa) nel Betanzos, A Coruña, Galicia, Spagna. Morì circa 1219, nel Galicia, Spagna, all'età di 83 anni, e fu sepolta a Santa Maria, Sobrado, A Coruña, Galicia, Spagna.

ja.lifeSummary: Teresa Bermudes de Travaが1137年に生まれた時，父Bermudo Pérez de Trava y Urgelは50歳，母Infanta Urraca Henriquesは40歳であった。彼女はFernán Arias de Saavedra Señor de Saavedra, de Lima y Batisselaとの間に少なくとも9人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。1145年，8歳の時，スペインガリシアア コルnアベタンゾスでの職業はabadesa del monasterio de as cascas (betanzos, galicia, españa)と記録されている。彼女は約1219年にスペインガリシアで83歳で死去し，スペインガリシアア コルnアソブラドサンタ マリアにて埋葬された。

ko.Santa Maria, Sobrado, La Coruña, Galicia: 스페인 갈리샤 아 코루n아 소브라도 산타 마이아
ko.San Cosme, Pontedeume, La Coruña, Galici: 스페인 갈리샤 아 코루n아 폰테데우 산 코스
ko.lifeSummary: Teresa Bermudes de Trava(이)가 1137년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Bermudo Pérez de Trava y Urgel(은)는 50세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Infanta Urraca Henriques(은)는 40세였다. 그녀는 Fernán Arias de Saavedra Señor de Saavedra, de Lima y Batissela(와)과 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 1145년, 8세의 나이로 그녀의 직업은 스페인 갈리샤 아 코루n아 베탠즈스에서 abadesa del monasterio de as cascas (betanzos, galicia, españa)이었다. 그녀는 대략 1219년 스페인 갈리샤에서 83세의 나이로 사망했으며 스페인 갈리샤 아 코루n아 소브라도 산타 마이아에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Teresa Bermudes de Trava nasceu em 1137, seu pai, Bermudo Pérez de Trava y Urgel, tinha 50 anos e sua mãe, Infanta Urraca Henriques, tinha 40 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 9 filhos e 3 filhas com Fernán Arias de Saavedra Señor de Saavedra, de Lima y Batissela. Em 1145, com 8 anos, sua profissão aparece como abadesa del monasterio de as cascas (betanzos, galicia, españa) em Betanzos, A Coruña, Galicia, Espanha. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1219, em Galicia, Espanha, com 83 anos, e foi sepultada em Santa Maria, Sobrado, A Coruña, Galicia, Espanha.

ru.San Cosme, Pontedeume, La Coruña, Galici: сан косм, понтедеюм, а коруnа, галися, Испания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Teresa Bermudes de Trava родилась в 1137 г., её отцу по имени Bermudo Pérez de Trava y Urgel было 50 лет, а матери, которую звали Infanta Urraca Henriques, 40. У неё было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 3 дочери от Fernán Arias de Saavedra Señor de Saavedra, de Lima y Batissela. В 1145 году, в возрасте 8 лет,  она работала по профессии abadesa del monasterio de as cascas (betanzos, galicia, españa) в местности бетанзос, а коруnа, галися, Испания. Она умерла около 1219 г. в местности галися, Испания в возрасте 83 лет и была похоронена в местности санта маря, собрадо, а коруnа, галися, Испания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Teresa Bermudes de Trava nació en 1137, su papá, Bermudo Pérez de Trava y Urgel, tenía 50 años y su mamá, Infanta Urraca Henriques, tenía 40 años. Tuvo por lo menos 9 hijos y 3 hijas con Fernán Arias de Saavedra Señor de Saavedra, de Lima y Batissela. En 1145, a la edad de 8 años, su ocupación registrada era abadesa del monasterio de as cascas (betanzos, galicia, españa) en Betanzos, La Coruña, Galicia, España. Murió aproximadamente 1219, en Galicia, España, a la edad de 83 años, y fue sepultada en Santa Maria, Sobrado, La Coruña, Galicia, España.
